campus.name: Heliopolis Campus
campus.description: Urban campus in East Cairo offering applied logistics, transport, and business-oriented education with bilingual delivery.

college.name: College of International Transport and Logistics – Heliopolis
college.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport
college.positioning: Applied logistics and international transport college delivering industry-oriented education in supply chain, trade, transport, and energy logistics with strong student support and bilingual instruction.
college.vision: To deliver distinctive, high-impact education in logistics and international transport that equips graduates to compete in regional and global markets.
college.mission: To prepare competent, adaptable, and industry-ready professionals in logistics and transport through modern teaching methods, practical exposure, and continuous skills development.

quality_assurance.description: Academic quality is governed by AASTMT institutional standards and CITL system-wide quality frameworks.

degree.degree_name: B.Sc. in Trade Logistics and International Transport Management

programs.name: Logistics and Supply Chain Management
programs.focus: Supply chain integration, inventory control, procurement, distribution, and operations

programs.name: International Trade Logistics Management
programs.focus: Customs, international trade operations, freight forwarding, and trade finance

programs.name: Transport Logistics Management
programs.focus: Transport operations, multimodal logistics, ports, and transport economics

programs.name: Energy and Petroleum Logistics Management
programs.focus: Energy supply chains, petroleum logistics, hazardous materials transport

professional_certificates.name: Certified Industrial Engineer (CIE)
professional_certificates.target_audience: Students and professionals seeking industrial and operational excellence

best_for: Students seeking applied rather than purely theoretical study
Students valuing financial and institutional support
not_ideal_for: Students seeking heavy mathematical or engineering depth
